scripts.build:client: cd clientwebsite && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:ownersite: cd ownersite && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:ownersite && npm run build:backend
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd clientwebsite && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../clientwebsite && npm install && cd ../ownersite && npm install
